ingredients_text:
Noodles 89.5%
[WHEAT flour, palm oil, salt, flour treatment agents (sodium carbonate, triphosphates), stabiliser (potassium carbonate), thickener (guar gum), antioxidant (tocopherol-rich extract)]

Seasoning powder 6.5%
[salt, flavour enhancers (monosodium glutamate, disodium 5'-ribonucleotides (E635)), sugar, soy sauce powder (SOYBEAN, WHEAT, salt, maltodextrin), hydrolysed maize protein, spices, colour (ammonia caramel), flavouring, leek, yeast extract, rapeseed oil, acidity regulator (citric acid), anti-caking agent (silicon dioxide)]

Seasoning sauce 4%
[soy sauce (water, SOYBEAN, WHEAT, salt) 70%, rapeseed oil, flavourings (contain CELERY)]

ingredients_text_en:
Noodles 89.5%
[WHEAT flour, palm oil, salt, flour treatment agents (sodium carbonate, triphosphates), stabiliser (potassium carbonate), thickener (guar gum), antioxidant (tocopherol-rich extract)]

Seasoning powder 6.5%
[salt, flavour enhancers (monosodium glutamate, disodium 5'-ribonucleotides (E635)), sugar, soy sauce powder (SOYBEAN, WHEAT, salt, maltodextrin), hydrolysed maize protein, spices, colour (ammonia caramel), flavouring, leek, yeast extract, rapeseed oil, acidity regulator (citric acid), anti-caking agent (silicon dioxide)]

Seasoning sauce 4%
[soy sauce (water, SOYBEAN, WHEAT, salt) 70%, rapeseed oil, flavourings (contain CELERY)]
ingredients_text_fr:
Nouilles 89,5% [farine de _BLÉ_, huile de palme, sel, agents de traitement de farine (E500, E451), stabilisant E501, épaississant E412, antioxydant E306], 

Poudre d'assaisonnement 6,5% [sel, exhausteurs de goût (E621, E635), sucre, poudre de sauce _SOJA_ (fèves de _SOJA_, _BLÉ_, sel, maltodextrine), protéines végétales hydrolysées, épices, colorant E150c, arôme (_blé_, _soja_), huile de colza, correcteur d'acidité: acide citrique], 

Sauce d'assaisonnement 4% [sauce _SOJA_ (eau, fèves de _SOJA_, _BLE_, sel), huile de colza, arômes (_CÉLERI_)],
